One of the most beloved seasons is back! Take the wheel of the legendary BMW M3 GTR and relive a true racing icon.  
Unlock exclusive rewards, decals, icons, frames, and more throughout the season.  
Missed it the first time? Now’s your chance to experience the season that became a legend.

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!

title: Manor Matters: Adventure Game
notes:
Ready for new adventures? Let's go!

EMBRACE OF DARKNESS
— Save Grace from the Dark Beast from the depths of the old mine!
— Uncover the mystery of the underground monster to prevent a disaster!
— Complete the event to get a new avatar and other valuable prizes!

THE MANUSCRIPT MYSTERY
— Help Eva deal with a mysterious manuscript that her life depends on!
— Investigate the mystery of the crimes from the prophetic book!
— Complete the event to get a unique avatar frame and other valuable prizes!
